Interface OpenApiComponents

All Superinterfaces:
Components, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30Components, OpenApi31Components, OpenApi32Components, OpenApi3xComponents
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30ComponentsImpl, OpenApi31ComponentsImpl, OpenApi32ComponentsImpl
public interface OpenApiComponents extends Components
